channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: First officer told United Airlines captain he was 'slow and a little low' before light pole strike, NTSB says
item.description: The NTSB released its preliminary report on a United Airlines plane that struck a light pole on the New Jersey Turnpike.

item.title: Appeals court to hear arguments on whether Trump's ballroom plans may proceed
item.description: Three appellate judges will hear arguments on whether construction for President Trump's White House ballroom plans should continue.

item.title: Senate passes reconciliation bill funding ICE for three years, without DOJ ban
item.description: Senate Republicans approved funding for DHS immigration enforcement after a vote-a-rama. The measure did not include a ban on DOJ funds.

item.title: Israel-Hezbollah fighting clouds prospects for U.S.-Iran peace deal
item.description: The status of U.S.-Iran talks to end the Iran war remains unclear amid ongoing hostilities between Israel and Iran-backed Hezbollah.
